calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Harold Goldman, is present. Represented by David Freed
Attorney, Saul Ferster, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Judy Kerns , is present.
Attorney, Elisa Miller, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-06-2010 is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JUDY KERNS' MOTION TO STRIKE IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON NOVEMBER 2, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
